title: Upon item creation, can I create a duplicate of the item and mirror the status?
excerpt: I need an automation like this: when an item is created in board A, the item gets duplicated and moved to board B. I want both items’s (item in board A, duplicate in board B) to be mirrored, so that if I change status on…

posts.author: danimorah (Daniela Mora)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need an automation like this: when an item is created in board A, the item gets duplicated and moved to board B. I want both items’s (item in board A, duplicate in board B) to be mirrored, so that if I change status on board B, the status gets changed in board A as well (or viceversa).

Is this possible?

posts.author: adeutsch (Atticus Deutsch)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. Go to the automations of board A and search “another board” and choose the automation that says “When status changes to something create an item in another board and connect them in the selected board”

posts.author: AronK (Aron-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @danimorah,

Did you still need help setting this up? If so, I hope this video provides some clarity on how you can accomplish this.

Let me know your thoughts!

-Aron
